name: United Kingdom
quarantine: No routine quarantine. Penalty quarantine up to 4 months if documentation is incorrect.
rabies_status: Rabies-free island. Strict import rules apply.

name: United States
quarantine: No quarantine for dogs with valid CDC compliance. Cats: no quarantine.
rabies_status: Rabies-controlled. CDC dog import rules effective Aug 2024.

name: United Arab Emirates
quarantine: No quarantine for compliant pets from approved countries.

name: Australia
quarantine: Mandatory 10-day post-arrival quarantine at AQIS facility in Melbourne.
rabies_status: Rabies-free. One of the strictest import regimes in the world.

name: Canada
quarantine: No quarantine for rabies-vaccinated dogs from most countries.
rabies_status: Rabies-controlled. Vaccination certificate required for dogs.

name: Germany
quarantine: No quarantine for pets from EU/listed countries with valid EU pet passport or AHC.
rabies_status: Rabies-free (EU). Rabies vaccination required for entry.

name: France
quarantine: No quarantine for compliant pets. EU pet passport or AHC required.
rabies_status: Rabies-free (EU). Titre test required from unlisted countries.

name: Singapore
quarantine: 10–30 days quarantine depending on origin country category.

name: Hong Kong
quarantine: No quarantine for pets from approved 'Category 1' countries.

name: South Africa
quarantine: No quarantine if paperwork is complete. Import permit required.

name: Spain
quarantine: No quarantine for EU-compliant pets. AHC required for non-EU origin.
rabies_status: Rabies-free (EU). Titre test may be required from high-risk countries.

name: New Zealand
quarantine: Mandatory 10-day quarantine. Only allowed from approved countries.
rabies_status: Rabies-free. Among the world's strictest biosecurity regimes.
